topic: European news on deletion, controversy, censorship, and removal of political speech on social media
editorial_overview: No relevant European news articles from the last week can be verified from the provided search results. The results supplied are mostly platform pages, general background pages, or unrelated items, rather than established news reports about politicians, public figures, or authorities deleting posts, facing social-media controversy, or ordering online speech removal. Because the prompt requires only verified reporting from reliable sources, no articles are included. A fresh search of major European outlets in multiple languages would be needed to build a valid press review on this topic.
